articles.title: Classification of GPAI Models with Systemic Risk
articles.summary: Systemic risk classification: (a) high-impact capabilities per benchmarks, or (b) Commission designation per Annex XIII criteria. Default threshold: 10^25 FLOPs cumulative training compute.

articles.title: Procedure for Classification
articles.summary: Providers must notify Commission when model meets systemic risk threshold. Commission may designate ex officio.

articles.title: Obligations for All GPAI Providers
articles.summary: Maintain technical documentation (Annex XI), provide downstream info (Annex XII), comply with Copyright Directive, publish training content summary. Free/open-licence models: only copyright and training summary.

articles.title: Authorised Representatives for Non-EU GPAI Providers
articles.summary: Non-EU GPAI providers must appoint EU authorised representative.

articles.title: Additional Obligations for Systemic Risk GPAI
articles.summary: Model evaluations, adversarial testing/red-teaming, serious incident tracking and reporting, cybersecurity protections, energy efficiency documentation.

articles.title: Codes of Practice
articles.summary: AI Office facilitates codes of practice for demonstrating GPAI compliance. To be finalised within 9 months of entry into force.
